title: Anansi: How the Spider Got All Stories
description: Anansi the spider tricks the sky god Nyame into giving him ownership of all the world's stories.
introduction: Anansi the spider tricks the sky god Nyame into giving him ownership of all the world's stories.

translation.text: Anansi said: 'I will bring you the python, the hornets, the leopard, and the fairy. Then give me all the stories.'
